calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT LUCINDA MOYERS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR IN LIGHT OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED ON OCTOBER 28, 2010. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Wendy Pun, CSR # 12891 =301/PJB

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-17-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Guru Krupa LLC, is present.
Attorney, Michael Heath, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Lucinda Moyers, is present.
Attorney, Puja Karl, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem A.M. Young, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of NOV-22-2010 remains on calendar.
